meta.title: DocuMind — AI Document Generation Platform
meta.description: Agentic AI platform that generates expert-level documents from natural language requests.

auth.name: Name
auth.privacyNotice: Your information is used only to manage document generation history.
auth.errorNameEmailRequired: Please enter both name and email.
auth.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

navigation.processingDescription: Moving to another conversation or screen can make the current progress harder to track. Do you want to continue?

welcome.heroTitle: What document can I create for you?
welcome.heroSubtitle: Describe your request in natural language and we will generate a professional document. Use the examples below to get started.

features.pipelineDesc: 12 specialized agents from planning through validation
features.templateDesc: Analyzes existing design templates to preserve style

prompts.techDesign: New service technical design doc for engineering
prompts.apiGuide: REST API guide for external developers

chat.inputPlaceholder: Enter a document request... (e.g. 12-slide cloud migration proposal)
chat.docGeneratedSuccess: Your document was generated successfully. View it in the panel on the right.
chat.docGenerationError: An error occurred while generating the document: {{error}}
chat.templateHelp: A native-format template can be attached only before the first message.
chat.formatLocked: The output format is fixed after the first document is generated.
chat.templateAttachHint: Attach a template matching the selected output format before the first message.
chat.imageAttachHint: Attach PNG, JPEG, WEBP, or GIF images only.
chat.imageOnlyPrompt: Analyze the attached image and apply the necessary document changes.

document.qualityScoreHelp: Quality score combining layout-rule checks and visual evaluation of the rendered PowerPoint output.
